title: chileranthemum lottiae
intro: Chileranthemum lottiae, also known as the Hawaiian false heliotrope, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Chileranthemum lottiae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and colds. Chileranthemum lottiae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for centuries.
